steering_brief.human_intent: Establish a controlled agentic workflow where later agents follow explicit steering and approval rules.
success_criteria: A product-level backlog exists before sprint contracting
Features remain proposed, deferred, or blocked unless explicitly approved
constraints: Return control to harness_orchestrator after planning
Do not create later agent definitions

requires_human_approval_for: Marking a feature as approved for sprint or implementation
Changing approved or in-progress feature statuses
Expanding scope beyond the steering contract

orchestration_decision.routing_rationale: Repository mapping is complete and product planning is the next required phase.

codemap_summary: Repository mapping is complete enough to plan product-level features. No source or test areas exist yet.

status_definitions.proposed: Feature is proposed for later review.
status_definitions.blocked: Feature needs human decision or missing input.

product_context.audience: future harness agents and human reviewers

user_needs: Understand which product-level capabilities should be planned next
success_criteria: A product-level backlog exists before sprint contracting
Features remain proposed, deferred, or blocked unless explicitly approved

human_messages.message: Draft product-level features only after repo_cartographer has completed and harness_orchestrator selects product_planner.
